1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="block-hero__heading block-hero__heading--wide"> <span></span> <span></span> </h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (201 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=8&content.link=73104&content.category=808&content.type.category=&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>MBLs juridiske avdeling</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Ta gjerne kontakt hvis du lurer på noe.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form

Medlemsfordeler

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/medlemskap/medlemsfordeler/
Avvik: 7 | Bestått: 50
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1> <a href="/"> <img alt="logo" src="/siteassets/bilder/mbl_kortform-copy.jpg"/> </a> </h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/artikler/andre-artikler/medlemsfordeler/nho-pensjon/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/01adf0
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/artikler/andre-artikler/medlemsfordeler/nho-forsikring/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/bilder
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://www.nho.no/Om-NHO/medlemsfordeler/kontakt-forsikring/?id=63387" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/sit
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=37&content.link=90857&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Konkurranser og utmerkelser

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/konkurranser/
Avvik: 208 | Bestått: 172
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Årets Mediepriser</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Ta gjerne kontakt hvis du lurer på noe.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/konkurranser/arets-mediepriser/arets-mediepriser/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/medie

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/konkurranser/avisgutten2/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/avisgutt.jpg?width=555 1x, /s
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/konkurranser/arets-avistegning/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/dokumenter/horinger/2025/tegni
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'arets-mediepriser' appears 2 times

id="arets-mediepriser"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (196 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=35&content.link=76306&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Ytringsfrihet

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/mediepolitikk/ytringsfrihet/
Avvik: 207 | Bestått: 175
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/e8cee551859e4780ae8fca2d47fd8bc5/fem-felleshoring.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/e8cee55
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/8bdcc9ed619a4572ab953d6f3a0536a7/shutterstock_redigert.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/8b
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/87faaef9bd7f434597ee52db466a5ab0/trosholmen.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/87faaef9bd7f4
Add descriptive alt text to the image
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-mediebedriftene"> <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) --> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=1054&conten
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/lovforslag-kan-uthule-kildevernet/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/e8cee551859e4780ae8fca2d47fd8bc5/fem-felleshor
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/barn-selvbestemmelsesrett-og-ytringsfrihet-ikke-tilstrekkelig-utredet/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/8bdcc9ed61
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/ingunn-trosholmen-blir-ny-administrerende-direktor-i-world-expression-forum/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/87fa
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (195 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

MBL ber om mva-klargjøring

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/artikler/2026/mbl-ber-om-mva-klargjoring/
Avvik: 206 | Bestått: 165
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (201 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=33&content.link=740320&content.category=&content.type.category=818&content.tags=" st
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/
Avvik: 231 | Bestått: 201

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="block-hero__heading block-hero__heading--wide"> <span></span> <span></span> </h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Den store journalistprisen

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/konkurranser/den-store-journalistprisen/
Avvik: 202 | Bestått: 168
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>Disse har vunnet den store journalistprisen:</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (196 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=33&content.link=91731&content.category=809&content.type.category=819&content.tags=jo
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

Vedtekter

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/om-mbl/vedtekter/
Avvik: 202 | Bestått: 166
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/siteassets/dokumenter/mbls-vedtekter-vedtatt-070525.pdf" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/bilder
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="nho-button" href="/siteassets/dokumenter/mbls-vedtekter-vedtatt-070525.pdf"> <span></span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (195 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=33&content.link=90851&content.category=&content.type.category=819&content.tags=" sty
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Annonsestatistikk

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/tall-og-fakta/annonsestatistikk/
Avvik: 204 | Bestått: 168
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-mediebedriftene"> <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) --> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=1054&conten
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="http://www.irm-media.se/no/publiceringsplan" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <figure> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/sitea
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="http://www.irm-media.se/no/publiceringsplan" target="_blank"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="http://www.irm-media.se/no/publiceringsplan" target="_blank"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (195 avvik)

Mellomoppgjøret 2023

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/arbeidsliv/Hovedoppgjoret_2024/
Avvik: 206 | Bestått: 181
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/ansattbilder/viktoria-vermedal_sh.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/ansattbilder/vi
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/0c2b93fde1744c72bd2aecef31f46465/arbeidsliv_shutterstock.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/c8c3d0e7a4b64bc5a146b480edba7e09/img_2133.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/c8c3d0e7a4b64bc
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/seks-arbeidsrettslige-tips-til-ledere-for-julebordsesongen/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/siteassets/bilder/ansattbilder/vikt
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/adgangen-til-a-ha-bedriftsintern-aldersgense-pa-70-ar-oppheves/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/0c2b93fde1744c72b
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2025/enighet-i-journalistoppgjoret/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/c8c3d0e7a4b64bc5a146b480edba7e09/img_2133.jpg?mode
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (195 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=35&content.link=124905&content.category=806&content.type.category=&content.tags=" st
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Mediebransjens samfunnsansvar

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/mediepolitikk/mediebransjens-samfunnsansvar/
Avvik: 200 | Bestått: 166
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (195 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=33&content.link=76130&content.category=&content.type.category=819&content.tags=samfu
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Innmelding

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/medlemskap/innmelding/
Avvik: 205 | Bestått: 159
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-mediebedriftene"> <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) --> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=1201&conten
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" id="_jsSearchOrganization" name="q" placeholder="Bedriftsnavn eller organisasjonsnummer" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (198 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=1201&content.link=224884&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" sty
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Årets avistegning

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/konkurranser/arets-avistegning/
Avvik: 203 | Bestått: 180
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-mediebedriftene"> <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) --> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=1054&conten
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '2023' appears 2 times

id="2023"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (196 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=1054&content.link=91706&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Opphavsrett

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/arbeidsliv/opphavsrett/
Avvik: 205 | Bestått: 183
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Ta gjerne kontakt hvis du lurer på noe.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (195 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=33&content.link=75802&content.category=812&content.type.category=819&content.tags="
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.nho.no/regionforeninger/"> <span> Alle regionkontor </span> </a>

Opplagstall

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/tall-og-fakta/opplagstall/
Avvik: 205 | Bestått: 203
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-mediebedriftene"> <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) --> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=1054&conten
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 style="text-align: center;">Alle aviser, magasiner og ukeblader tilsluttet Mediebedriftenes Landsforening (MBL) skal gi oppgave etter de regler MBL fastsetter. Regler for Opplagsoppgaver er utarbe
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="nho-button" href="/tall-og-fakta/q--a-opplagstall/"> <span></span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="/siteassets/dokumenter/tall-og-fakta/opplag/handbok_opplagsregler_2021.pdf" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-trend-up"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Opplagstall' appears 2 times

id="Opplagstall"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (195 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=1054&content.link=76592&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

Dette er MBL

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/om-mbl/
Avvik: 227 | Bestått: 228
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Om MBL</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Ta gjerne kontakt hvis du lurer på noe.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (23 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/om-mbl/om-mediebedriftenes-landsforening-mbl/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/collacemb
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

MODERATE

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/om-mbl/distriktsforeninger/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/ansattbilder/hovedstyre25/d

<a class="nho-button" href="https://mblmelding23.tilda.ws/" target="_blank"> <span>Les årsmeldingen her</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="http://mbl2023.tilda.ws/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/mblmelding22.jpg?width=655 1x,
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (195 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=35&content.link=75266&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Innfører «Schibsted annonsevalg» for å finansiere journalistikken

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/artikler/2026/innforer-schibsted-annonsevalg-for-a-finansiere-journalistikken/
Avvik: 206 | Bestått: 165
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (201 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=33&content.link=744591&content.category=&content.type.category=818&content.tags=" st
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="menu-link" href="https://sjomatnorge.no/"> <span> Sjømat Norge </span> </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Kategorier

https://www.mediebedriftene.no/konkurranser/arets-mediepriser/papirkategorier/
Avvik: 210 | Bestått: 170
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/mediebedrif
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/konkurranser/arets-mediepriser/om-konkurransen/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteasset
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/konkurranser/arets-mediepriser/om-konkurransen/" target="_blank"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="/konkurranser/arets-mediepriser/om-konkurransen/" target="_blank"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-banner block-banner-secondary block-banner-solid" href="https://forms.gle/2ivzJ5nCmPziWqQ69" target="_blank"> <div class="block-banner-content"> <h2>Meld på dine bidrag her</h2> <p> <s
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (201 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-KTCNM2G&content.type.id=33&content.link=76325&content.category=&content.type.category=819&content.tags=" sty
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

https://mediebedriftene.no

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://mediebedriftene.no --max-pages 20 --format html
